meanings.definition: a onetime custom during courtship of unmarried couples occupying the same bed without undressing
the act of binding something into a bundle

examples: she complained about bundling the children off to school
he bundled up his few possessions

meanings.definition: gather or cause to gather into a cluster
examples: She bunched her fingers into a fist

meanings.definition: sleep fully clothed in the same bed with one's betrothed
